fields.label: View
fields.rationale: Form is the canonical place for field handlers, custom buttons, show/hide logic. List applies to the list view. set_only_once - cannot be toggled after save. istable=1 DocTypes (child tables) require a separate Client Script each.

fields.label: Script body (JavaScript)
fields.rationale: Browser-sandboxed JS. Use frappe.ui.form.on('<DocType>', { handler_name: function(frm) { ... } }) for Form scripts; frappe.listview_settings['<DocType>'] = { ... } for List scripts. Common handlers: refresh (runs on every form load), <fieldname> (runs on field-change), validate (runs before save), after_save, before_submit. Read via frm.doc.<field>; mutate via frm.set_value; add buttons via frm.add_custom_button. NEVER use jQuery selectors against Desk chrome - Desk markup is not a stable contract and breaks between versions.

fields.label: Enabled
fields.rationale: Default enabled. Disabled scripts are still stored and loaded into the bundle - the check is at execution time; rely on this for staging but not for security.
